list.name: device
list.label: Device
list.query: SELECT device_name AS __text, device_name AS __value FROM inventory GROUP BY device_name ORDER BY device_name

targets.rawSql: SELECT device_name AS "Device", component AS "PON Port", ROUND(value::numeric, 1) AS "RX Power (dBm)", CASE WHEN value = -40 THEN 'NO SIGNAL' WHEN value < -27 THEN 'WEAK' WHEN value BETWEEN -27 AND -8 THEN 'GOOD' ELSE 'CHECK' END AS "Status" FROM metrics WHERE category = 'OPTICAL' AND metric_name LIKE '%rx-power%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) AND device_name IN (${device:sqlstring}) AND (device_name, component, collected_at) IN (SELECT device_name, component, MAX(collected_at) FROM metrics WHERE category = 'OPTICAL' AND metric_name LIKE '%rx-power%' AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) GROUP BY device_name, component) ORDER BY device_name, component;

SELECT collected_at AS time, value AS "RX Power (dBm)", device_name || '/' || component AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'OPTICAL' AND metric_name LIKE '%rx-power%' AND value > -40 AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) AND device_name IN (${device:sqlstring}) ORDER BY collected_at;

SELECT collected_at AS time, value AS "TX Power (dBm)", device_name || '/' || component AS metric FROM metrics WHERE category = 'OPTICAL' AND metric_name LIKE '%tx-power%' AND value > -40 AND DATE(collected_at) = (SELECT sim_date FROM simulation_state LIMIT 1) AND device_name IN (${device:sqlstring}) ORDER BY collected_at;
